items.note:
虚拟化技术

目前主流的虚拟化技术，如 kvm，qvm 之类，都是在 host os 中增加了一些 EL2 特权级代码，放到内存中，供跳转后执行

后续计划是看一下 seL4 的相关实现，应该是类似的

我可以做什么

  1. QNX + RUST 能否提升开发效率和质量，能否引入更多 rust 包
  2. arm IPC 优化，能否 porting 到 qnx 中，提升效率
  3. 暂时愿意做更多的工程实现工作，因为目前对 QNX 还不是很了解，没办法做一些研究工作

有一个想法是，如果想要做深入研究，必须对硬件架构非常熟悉，如果选的话，我还是觉得选择 arm 比较好，后续工作中更多还是使用 arm

items.title: arch
design
muon_design

items.note:
QNX learning

“A large part of this abstraction is made possible by the use of a system page (syspage), an area of memory initialised at startup and used by Neutrino to perform hardware-dependent tasks.” 这种抽象的很大一部分是通过使用系统页面( syspage )来实现的，一个在启动时初始化的内存区域，被中微子用来执行硬件相关的任务。

syspage 用来支持不同 soc 上的移植，syspage 主要保存 callout，硬件布局等等，有点类似 dtb？

callout 则是一段代码，比如中断初始化，供内核在需要的时候调用

“Kernel Concurrency” 内核并发。

8.0 之前的内核并发主要是由于中断嵌套造成的

“These are each of a fixed size adequate for 4 to 5 levels of interrupt nesting,”

所以是支持中断嵌套的

“The key design decision is that, with one exception (see the description of long-duration operations below),” 关键的设计决定是，除(见下文对长时间操作的描述)外，.

比较粗暴的大锁

“However, interrupts (maskable and non-maskable) can occur at any time, irrespective of the state of the kernel and, if a kernel activity is in progress, it is suspended and the interrupt service routine (ISR) executed.” 然而，中断(可屏蔽的和不可屏蔽的)可以发生在任何时间，与内核的状态无关，并且，如果一个内核活动正在进行，它将被挂起并执行中断服务程序( ISR )。

中断嵌套，但是有点没懂是怎么让 execption 阻塞的，是类似于关中断操作，还是软件实现。关中断操作是否有更加细粒度的设计

“The ISR makes use of the kernel stack because the stack of the thread that invoked the suspended kernel activity may not available as the ISR runs:” ISR使用内核堆栈，因为在ISR运行时，调用挂起内核活动的线程的堆栈可能不可用：

所以是一个单内核堆栈的设计？

“a page fault may result and such a fault could cause the kernel to fail if it occurs when the kernel is locked.” 当内核被锁定时，可能会导致页面故障，而这种故障可能会导致内核失效。

所以中断处理时只能用内核堆栈

“Kernel activities are divided into three phases:” 核心活动分为三个阶段：.

中断发生情况的分析，分为三种。qnx 对于中断嵌套的设计是比较详细的，但是目前还不太想看

“Neutrino allows the memory for stacks to be allocated either in a greedy or lazy manner. In a greedy allocation the physical memory is allocated and reserved when the stack is created. In lazy allocation, physical memory is allocated only when required.” 中微子允许以贪婪或懒惰的方式分配堆栈的内存。在贪婪分配中，物理内存在堆栈创建时进行分配和预留。在惰性分配中，只有在需要时才分配物理记忆。

那需要出发 page fault 然后进行分配

“Stacks are allocated at the thread (rather than process) level. It is important that applications be protected from inadvertently overflowing their stack as this can lead to undefined behaviour. To reduce the chances of this occurring, Neutrino allocates a writeprotected guard page of memory at the “top” of the stack.” 栈在线程(而不是过程)级别进行分配。重要的是保护应用程序不被无意中溢出其堆栈，因为这可能导致未定义的行为。为了减少这种情况的发生，Neutrino在堆栈的"顶部"分配了一个写保护的内存保护页。

栈顶有一个保护页，防止栈溢出影响其他 task

“To prevent this, all addresses passed as parameters to kernel calls are deliberately accessed before the kernel is locked.”

在锁住进行处理之前，会检查下地址，防止锁住无法处理异常

“Lazy FPU Context Switching” 懒惰的Fpu语境切换。

印象中 seL4 也有类似的设计，避免每次上下文切换都带上 FPU 寄存器

nto_process_create 是 ker 中创建任务的函数

710 中 syscall 是通过数组执行对应的 handler，比如 ker_call_table 中的 thread_create

qnx 中有一个特点就是，kernel 和操作系统服务公用头文件，以及一些实现，比如 内存管理等

调度策略先不看了，先了解 qnx 整体

“The limits of physical memory of a particular hardware configuration on which Neutrino is running are supplied in the system page (syspage)” 中微子运行的特定硬件配置的物理内存限制在系统页面( syspage )中提供。

kernel 可以使用的物理内存是由 syspage 中定义

“the kernel memory space appears in the logical address space for each process (the actual location in memory differs between processor families). This memory is contiguous in physical memory.” 内核内存空间出现在每个进程(处理器家族在内存中的实际位置是不同的)的逻辑地址空间中。这种记忆在物理记忆中是连续的。

很关键的点，和 Linux 一样，是共页表的，连续的话代表可能是 fixed offset 映射

“Note that Neutrino does not provide a mechanism for swapping memory to and from disc.” 需要注意的是，中微子并没有提供一种将内存交换到磁盘和从磁盘交换的机制。

swap 这种不支持，确实根据使用场景也不需要吧

“Figure 8.1: Logical Address Spaces” 见图8。1：逻辑地址空间。

很典型的设计，和 Linux 一样

“User Mode Page Faults” 用户模式页面故障。

这块有点没看懂，处理是在内核态还是用户态中，需要后续再看看

“for recoverable faults, PageFaultWait() is called to send a pulse to the memmgr. The faulting thread is blocked in STATE_WAITPAGE. A memmgr thread receives the pulse and processes the fault:” 对于可恢复故障，调用PageFaultWait ( )向memmgr发送脉冲。故障线程在STATE _ WAITPAGE中被阻塞，一个memmgr线程接收脉冲并处理故障：

所以 pagefault 也不是由 kernel 处理的，而是由 memmgr 进行处理，kernel 发一个 pulse 给 memmgr 由它处理，也算是微内核标准的做法吧

“its priority may be set (depending on the configuration of the channel), as described in chapter ??, to the highest of the priorities of SEND_BLOCKED clients. If another client sends a message while the server is busy (and therefore becomes SEND_BLOCKED) the priority of the server is again adjusted.” 它的优先权可以设置为(视通道的配置而定)，如第一章所述，至于SEND _ BLOCKED客户端的最高优先权。如果另一个客户端在服务器繁忙时发送消息(因此成为SEND _ BLOCKED)，则重新调整服务器的优先级。

避免出现 server 无法调度到情况

“(as some processors have particularly efficient instructions for this transfer).” (因为有些处理器对这种转移有特别高效的指令)。

这个没有例子，但是会显著提高 IPC 效率，不知道 qnx 是怎么做的

“Neutrino guarantees that, however the transfer is performed, the message buffer is never writable by both sender and receiver at any one time.”

sender receiver 不会同时写 buffer，确保一致性

“As described in section ?? on page ??, on some processor architectures Neutrino optimises performance by allowing the interruption of the copying of messages with length above a threshold but the design ensures that,”

这是用了寄存器吗，和 seL4 类似？

“Priority Inversion Avoidance” 优先级反转避免。

这章先不看吧

techtalk 笔记

地址空间分为 sys 和 usr 两部分，sys 是共享的，包括 kernel 和 process manager ，不是传统理解的 kernel 空间。usr 是每个进程独立的，即使是 process manager 也有自己的 usr 空间

kerext_* 代码是为了 proc 在内核中的实现，有一部分 proc 操作需要更高特权级，进行这些操作时会进入 kerext，但是这部分需要看看，感觉讲的有点模糊

ring0 前缀的代码通常指用户态的操作，是 x86 遗留的说法

procnto 和 kernel 共享一些数据，是否有快速进入内核的方法？听起来是有一些 special call 的设计，只有 procnto 可以做的，有一个 flag tf_ring0。其实 seL4 中也是同样的，加载启动应用是需要 roottask 来做的。查了下代码，还是 trap 进去，只不过类似 fastpath，直接在 kernel 中执行相应命令了，但是通过这个可以看哪些代码是可能在用户态执行的

VMM

启动的时候，会分配一小块内存作为堆，供 mm 使用，这个做法和我在 arceos 中的做法完全一样，先弄一个小堆给 mm 使用，然后由 mm 管理大堆

syscall

qnx 的 syscall 通过一个表进行管理 ker_call_table

ring0 是一个很特殊的 syscall，当用户态想要在内核中执行某些函数的时候需要用到，其实很怀疑这样真的安全吗，那岂不是我写一个应用，使用 ring0 执行一个毁灭性操作，系统挂了

编译

如果你的环境变量中带 NAME，就会覆盖 makefile 中自动定义，自动的是文件夹名，所以需要将环境变量中的 name unset

在 qemu 上编译和运行，基本参照 https://wikis.rim.net/display/~nbhad/Debugging+kernel+using+qemu
但是 ifs 中 module 不要加上 module=qvm

callout

callout 有一个很巧妙的设计，在汇编中这么写

#define CALLOUT_START(rtn, rw_size, patcher)  
.globl rtn;  
.align 3;  
rtn:;  
.xword rw_size;  
.xword patcher;  
.long end_##rtn - start_##rtn;  
start_##rtn:

在头文件中重新定义，直接转换成结构体

struct callout_rtn { unsigned *rw_size; void (*patcher)(PADDR_T paddr, uintptr_t vaddr, unsigned rtn_offset, unsigned rw_offset, void *data, const struct callout_rtn *src); unsigned rtn_size; uint8_t rtn_code[1]; };G

中断

传入的中断号 id 通过 get_interrupt_level 转成 kernel 注册的 ID
interrupt_level 是中断的表

中断代码注册可以见 cpu_gen_transfer，在某个地方增加一行指令，跳转到 handler。为啥要这么设计，感觉又复杂又容易出错。

interrupt_level 这张表里存着 irq handler，这个 handler 是可以自定义然后 attach 进去的

ipi 可以 attach，但是不确定能否触发，以及出发后到什么地方

内核线程

QNX 有一个很有意思的设计，线程可以申请进入到 EL1 内核态执行，在 aarch64 上的实现方式是修改 pstate 寄存器中的某一个值，eret 之前可以设置 spsr_el1 寄存器，就可以跳到对应的特权级，QNX 中会跳到 EL1t ，和 EL1h 不同，这个模式会使用 app 的栈空间，和普通线程的唯一区别是，它可以执行一些特权级操作

有一个疑问，从 EL1t svc 到 EL1h 会更快吗。测试了一下，发现通过 svc 是差不多的，有没有可能优化成函数调用？参考 readleaf，clf 的工作。能否把这些移到 seL4 以及 qnx 上。也就是说线程运行在 EL1t，但是执行 syscall 改成函数调用？

在这个基础上再加上模块主动检查和恢复，感觉是比较完整的工作。这是在微内核上的工作。主要是考虑将类似 qnx resource manager 这种放到内核态，然后供 kernel 调用？但是改动可能会比较大，准备研究下 resource manager 的实现

Linux module 的我还要再调研下怎么做

items.note:
SDEI 和 IPI 功能开发

  1. Linux 中 SDEI 实现草靠 arm_sdei.c, 简单来说就是通过 smc 到 EL3 的 firmware，firmware 会根据 function id 找到对应的处理函数
  2. sdei 可调用操作见 arm_sdei.h
  3. smc 调用实现见 smccc-call.S
  4. 需要使用 callout 的方式将 sdei 所有操作注册到 kernel 中，但是如果全部用汇编写，这部分还比较麻烦，考虑用 c 实现，然后转换。应该只需要把 smccc 和 ipi 发送这两部分注入到内核中，其他还是在用户态实

讨论后

QNX thread_ctl syscall 可以将线程等级提升到 EL1 中执行，所以 smc 和 ipi 都没有问题了。那此时使用的是 arm EL1t 的方式，供一个页表

items.title: Frequent background polling on a shared thread, using light-weight compiler interrupts
items.abstractNote: Recent work in networking, storage and multi-threading has demonstrated improved performance and scalability by replacing kernel-mode interrupts with high-rate user-space polling. Typically, such polling is performed by a dedicated core. Compiler Interrupts (CIs) instead enable efficient, automatic high-rate polling on a shared thread, which performs other work between polls. CIs are instrumentation-based and light-weight, allowing frequent interrupts with little performance impact. For example, when targeting a 5,000 cycle interval, the median overhead of our fastest CI design is 4% vs. 800% for hardware interrupts, across programs in the SPLASH-2, Phoenix and Parsec benchmark suites running with 32 threads.

items.title: Lightweight Preemptible Functions
items.abstractNote: Lamenting the lack of a natural userland abstraction for preemptive interruption and asynchronous cancellation, we propose lightweight preemptible functions, a mechanism for synchronously performing a function call with a precise timeout that is lightweight, eﬃcient, and composable, all while being portable between programming languages. We present the design of libinger, a library that provides this abstraction, on top of which we build libturquoise, arguably the ﬁrst generalpurpose and backwards-compatible preemptive thread library implemented entirely in userland. Finally, we demonstrate this software stack’s applicability to and performance on the problems of combatting head-ofline blocking and time-based DoS attacks.

items.title: ARM Virtualization: Performance and Architectural Implications
items.abstractNote: ARM servers are becoming increasingly common, making server technologies such as virtualization for ARM of growing importance. We present the ﬁrst study of ARM virtualization performance on server hardware, including multicore measurements of two popular ARM and x86 hypervisors, KVM and Xen. We show how ARM hardware support for virtualization can enable much faster transitions between VMs and the hypervisor, a key hypervisor operation. However, current hypervisor designs, including both Type 1 hypervisors such as Xen and Type 2 hypervisors such as KVM, are not able to leverage this performance beneﬁt for real application workloads. We discuss the reasons why and show that other factors related to hypervisor software design and implementation have a larger role in overall performance. Based on our measurements, we discuss changes to ARM’s hardware virtualization support that can potentially bridge the gap to bring its faster VM-to-hypervisor transition mechanism to modern Type 2 hypervisors running real applications. These changes have been incorporated into the latest ARM architecture.

notes.note:
零散笔记

“Although ARM hardware virtualization support incurs higher overhead on VM-to-hypervisor transitions for Type 2 hypervisors than x86,” (Dall 等, 2016, p. 305) 尽管 ARM 硬件虚拟化支持在 2 类虚拟机管理程序的虚拟机到虚拟机管理程序转换方面比 x86 会产生更高的开销，

上下文更多了

“Type 2 hypervisors typically modify the existing OS to facilitate running of VMs, either by integrating the Virtual Machine Monitor (VMM) into the existing OS source code base, or by installing the VMM as a driver into the OS.” (Dall 等, 2016, p. 305) Type 2 Hypervisor通常通过将虚拟机监控器( Virtual Machine Monitor，VMM )集成到现有的OS源码库中，或者将VMM作为驱动程序安装到OS中，来修改现有的OS，以方便VM的运行。

关于 type1 type2 的解释相当清晰了

“When a KVM VM performs I/O it involves trapping to EL2, switching to host EL1, and handling the I/O request in the host.” (Dall 等, 2016, p. 307) 当KVM虚拟机执行I / O时，它涉及到捕获到EL2，切换到主机EL1，并处理主机中的I/O请求。

virtio 设备的处理过程

“Because Xen only emulates the GIC in EL2 and offloads all other I/O handling to Dom0, when a Xen VM performs I/O, it involves trapping to the hypervisor, signaling Dom0, scheduling Dom0, and handling the I/O request in Dom0.” (Dall 等, 2016, p. 307) 由于Xen只模拟EL2中的GIC并将其他所有I / O处理卸载到Dom0，因此当Xen虚拟机执行I / O时，涉及到捕获到虚拟机管理程序、向Dom0发送信号、调度Dom0以及处理Dom0中的I/O请求。

Xen 也基本是一个 type2 了，在 arm 上。总的来说，在 arm 上实现一个完全 type1 型 hypervisor 几乎是不可能的，工作量太大，不知道 rust 在这方面有没有什么优势

“VHE allows running an OS designed to run in EL1 to run in EL2 without substantial modifications to the OS source code. We show how this allows KVM ARM and its Linux host kernel to run entirely in EL2 without substantial modifications to Linux. VHE is provided through the addition of a new” (Dall 等, 2016, p. 313) VHE允许运行设计在EL1中运行的操作系统在EL2中运行，而不需要对操作系统源代码进行实质性修改。我们展示了如何允许KVM ARM和它的Linux主机内核在EL2中完全运行，而无需对Linux进行实质性的修改。通过添加新的VHE提供。

host OS 整个放到 hypervisor 中运行吗，QNX 有同样的做法吗，好像 8.0 版本是有了

items.title: KVM/ARM: the design and implementation of the linux ARM hypervisor
items.abstractNote: As ARM CPUs become increasingly common in mobile devices and servers, there is a growing demand for providing the benefits of virtualization for ARM-based devices. We present our experiences building the Linux ARM hypervisor, KVM/ARM, the first full system ARM virtualization solution that can run unmodified guest operating systems on ARM multicore hardware. KVM/ARM introduces split-mode virtualization, allowing a hypervisor to split its execution across CPU modes and be integrated into the Linux kernel. This allows KVM/ARM to leverage existing Linux hardware support and functionality to simplify hypervisor development and maintainability while utilizing recent ARM hardware virtualization extensions to run virtual machines with comparable performance to native execution. KVM/ARM has been successfully merged into the mainline Linux kernel, ensuring that it will gain wide adoption as the virtualization platform of choice for ARM. We provide the first measurements on real hardware of a complete hypervisor using ARM hardware virtualization support. Our results demonstrate that KVM/ARM has modest virtualization performance and power costs, and can achieve lower performance and power costs compared to x86-based Linux virtualization on multicore hardware.

notes.note:
零散记录

“ARM introduced a new CPU mode for running hypervisors called Hyp mode, but Hyp mode has its own set of features distinct from existing kernel modes.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 333)

这个其实也是我一直疑惑的问题，就是 hyp 态到底是干嘛的

“Splitmode virtualization makes it possible to take advantage of the benefits of a hosted hypervisor design by running the hypervisor in normal privileged CPU modes to leverage existing OS mechanisms without modification while at the same time still using Hyp mode to leverage ARM hardware virtualization features.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 334) 拆分模式虚拟化可以利用托管管理程序设计的好处，在正常的CPU特权模式下运行管理程序来利用现有的操作系统机制，而不需要修改，同时仍然使用Hyp模式来利用ARM硬件虚拟化的特性。

所以 kvm qvm 这种本质上还是跑在 supervisor 态，同时可能有一些指令在 hyp 态

“To run VMs, the hypervisor must at least partially reside in Hyp mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 为了运行虚拟机，虚拟机管理程序必须至少部分驻留在Hyp模式。

如上面猜测，是有一些程序要运行在 hyp 态

“At this point, the hardware traps into Hyp mode giving control to the hypervisor, which can then manage the hardware and provide the required isolation across VMs. Once the condition is processed by the hypervisor, the CPU can be switched back into user or kernel mode and the VM can continue executing.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 此时，硬件进入Hyp模式，对管理程序进行控制，管理程序可以对硬件进行管理，并提供所需的跨虚拟机隔离。一旦条件被管理程序处理，CPU可以切换回用户或内核模式，VM可以继续执行。

“ARM designed the virtualization support around a separate CPU mode distinct from existing kernel mode,” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) ARM围绕着独立的CPU模式设计了不同于现有内核模式的虚拟化支持。

所以 x86 和 arm 的虚拟化模式是很不一样的，反倒是 arm 和 riscv 有点像

“Similarly to nested page tables on x86, ARM provides a second set of page tables, Stage-2 page tables, which translate from IPAs to PAs corresponding to guest and host physical addresses, respectively.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 类似于x86的嵌套页表，ARM提供了第二套页表，即Stage - 2页表，分别对应于客户和主机的物理地址，从IPA到PA。

虚拟化也可以使用页表进行地址虚拟化，这个不知道是不是和 mmu 一样，也许只是把 root pte 放到另一个寄存器中

“Stage-2 page tables use ARM’s new LPAE page table format, with subtle differences from the page tables used by kernel mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) Stage - 2页表采用ARM新的LPAE页表格式，与内核模式使用的页表有细微差别。

“Memory-Mapped interface (MMIO)” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335)

MMIO 将外设寄存器映射到地址空间

“Trapping all interrupts to Hyp mode ensures that the hypervisor retains control, but requires emulating virtual interrupts in software to signal events to VMs. This is cumbersome to manage and expensive because each step of interrupt and virtual interrupt processing, such as ACKing and EOIing, must go through the hypervisor.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 将所有中断捕获到Hyp模式可以确保管理程序保留控制，但需要在软件中模拟虚拟中断来向虚拟机发送事件。由于每一步的中断和虚拟中断处理，如ACKing和EOIing，都要经过管理程序，所以管理起来比较繁琐，而且代价昂贵。

中断直接发送到 hyp 中，就是调用 hyp 模式下的 handler。然后发送虚拟中断到 VM。但是如果纯软件实现，消耗会非常高。arm 中断硬件对虚拟化有支持

“The GIC v2.0 includes hardware virtualization support in the form of a virtual GIC (VGIC) so that receiving virtual interrupts does not need to be emulated in software by the hypervisor.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) GIC V2 . 0以虚拟GIC ( VGIC )的形式包含对硬件虚拟化的支持，使得接收虚拟中断不需要管理程序在软件中进行仿真。

“Virtual interrupts are generated by writing to special registers, the list registers, in the VGIC hypervisor control interface, and the VGIC CPU interface raises the virtual interrupts directly to a VM’s kernel mode” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 虚拟中断通过写入VGIC管理程序控制接口中的特殊寄存器(列表寄存器)产生，VGIC CPU接口将虚拟中断直接提升到虚拟机的内核模式。

写入寄存器即可触发虚拟中断

“Note that the distributor must still be emulated in software and all accesses to the distributor by a VM must still trap to the hypervisor” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 需要注意的是，分销商仍然必须在软件中被模拟，并且VM对分销商的所有访问仍然必须捕获到虚拟机管理程序。

GICD 还是纯软件的，因为它只是用于配置，VM 对 GICD 操作时，会 trap 到 hyp

“when a virtual CPU sends a virtual IPI to another virtual CPU, this will cause a trap to the hypervisor, which emulates the distributor access in software and programs the list registers on the receiving CPU’s GIC hypervisor control interface.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 335) 当一个虚拟CPU向另一个虚拟CPU发送一个虚拟IPI时，会对管理程序造成陷阱，管理程序在软件上模拟分发器的访问，并在接收CPU的GIC管理程序控制接口上编程列表寄存器。

VM IPI 中断的触发是由 hyp 做的，不知道现在是否还是这样，因为 IPI 中断发送就是通过设置 GICD 然后实现的，所以 GICD 的功能在虚拟化中完全由 hyp 软件实现了

“ARM provides virtualization support for the timers by introducing a new counter, the virtual counter and a new timer, the virtual timer.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) ARM通过引入一个新的计数器- -虚拟计数器和一个新的定时器- -虚拟定时器，为定时器提供虚拟化支持。

有一个虚拟定时器，用于 timer，否则 hypervisor 需要使用软件提供定时，这样需要一直运行 hypervisor，同时有很多的损耗

“In contrast, Intel has root and non-root mode [20], which are orthogonal to the CPU protection modes.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) 相比之下，Intel有根模式和非根模式[ 20 ]，它们与CPU保护模式是正交的。

所以 supervisor 模式也是有 root non-root 模式

“While sensitive operations on ARM trap to Hyp mode, sensitive operations can trap from non-root mode to root mode while staying in the same protection level on Inte” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) 当ARM上的敏感操作捕获到Hyp模式时，敏感操作可以从非根模式捕获到根模式，同时在Inte上保持相同的保护水平。

x86 上不是特权级之间的 trap，还是从 non-root 到 root

“ARM benefited from hindsight in including Stage-2 translation whereas Intel did not include its equivalent Extended Page Table (EPT) support until its second generation virtualization hardware.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) ARM在第二阶段的翻译中受益于后见之明，而英特尔直到其第二代虚拟化硬件才包括其等效的扩展页表( Extended Page Table，EPT )支持。

也可能是 ARM 借鉴的 x86

“ARM’s support for virtual interrupts also had no x86 counterpart. Without virtual APIC support, EOIing interrupts in an x86 VM requires traps to root mode, whereas ARM’s virtual GIC avoids the cost of trapping to Hyp mode” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) ARM对虚拟中断的支持也没有x86的对应。在没有虚拟APIC支持的情况下，x86虚拟机中的EOIing中断需要陷阱到root模式，而ARM的虚拟GIC避免了陷阱到Hyp模式的代价。

意思是时钟中断需要先进到 hypervisor，然后由 hypervisor 找到对应的 VM cpu，然后 raise 中断？

“Reading a counter, however, is not a privileged operation on x86 and does not trap, even without virtualization support in the counter hardware.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) 然而，读计数器并不是x86上的特权操作，即使没有计数器硬件的虚拟化支持，也不会陷害计数器。

x86 上可以直接读类似 arm 的时钟寄存器是吗

“While a standalone bare metal hypervisor design approach has the potential for better performance and a smaller Trusted Computing Base (TCB), this approach is less practical on ARM.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) 虽然单独的裸金属管理程序设计方法具有更好的性能和更小的可信计算基( Trusted Computing Base，TCB )的潜力，但这种方法在ARM上的实用性较低。

现在有哪些是在裸机上开发的 hypervisor (Xen)，而且要怎么执行呢，类似 kernel 吗，这种事 stage-1 还是 stage-2\

“While KVM/ARM benefits from its integration with Linux in terms of portability and hardware support, a key problem we had to address was that the ARM hardware virtualization extensions were designed to support a standalone hypervisor design where the hypervisor is completely separate from any standard kernel functionality, as discussed in Section 2.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336) 虽然KVM / ARM在可移植性和硬件支持方面得益于其与Linux的集成，但我们必须解决的一个关键问题是，ARM硬件虚拟化扩展被设计为支持独立的管理程序设计，其中管理程序与任何标准内核功能完全分离，如第2节所讨论的。

和 x86 不同，x86 可以完全跑在 root 模式中，没有特权级切换的问题，而 arm 则是完全不同的

“However, since KVM/ARM leverages existing kernel infrastructure such as the scheduler, running KVM/ARM in Hyp mode implies running the Linux kernel in Hyp mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 336)

有点类似将 OS 跑在用户态，OS 架在 OS 上的感觉，调度，资源分配都是通过 host OS

“Second, running the entire kernel in Hyp mode would adversely affect native performance” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 其次，在Hyp模式下运行整个内核会对本机性能产生不利影响。

Linux 运行在 hypervisor 模式实在是太重了，但是 seL4 这种微内核可以吗

“Hyp mode uses a single page table register and therefore cannot have direct access to the user space portion of the address space.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) Hyp模式使用单一的页表寄存器，因此无法直接访问地址空间中的用户空间部分

riscv 无论如何都是单页表

“Frequently used functions to access user memory would require the kernel to explicitly map user space data into kernel address space and subsequently perform necessary teardown and TLB maintenance operations,” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 频繁使用的访问用户内存的函数会要求内核显式地将用户空间数据映射到内核地址空间，然后执行必要的拆卸和TLB维护操作。

如果内核和用户空间共一个页表，会造成性能损失

“This is done by splitting the hypervisor into two components, the lowvisor and the highvisor,” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 这是通过将管理程序拆分为两个组件来完成的，即lowvisor和highvisor。

之前一直想不清楚的地方，hypervisor 其实是分成两部分的，一部分在 host os 中，另一部分运行在 hypervisor 模式

“The lowvisor directly interacts with hardware protection features and is therefore highly critical and the code base is kept to an absolute minimum.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) Lowvisor直接与硬件保护功能交互，因此非常关键，并且代码基保持到绝对的最小值。

lowvisor 跑在 hypervisor 中

“Third, the lowvisor provides a virtualization trap handler, which handles interrupts and exceptions that must trap to the hypervisor.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 第三，lowvisor提供了一个虚拟化陷阱处理程序，它处理必须陷阱到管理程序的中断和异常。

这里是说外设中断吧，还是所有中断，如果所有中断都要经过 lowvisor 处理，那好像还是有一些损耗，这个留个疑问，后续查看

“For example, while the lowvisor provides a low-level trap-handler and the low-level mechanism to switch from one world to another, the highvisor handles Stage-2 page faults from the VM and performs instruction emulation.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 例如，当lowvisor提供了一个低级陷阱处理程序和从一个世界切换到另一个世界的低级机制时，highvisor处理来自VM的Stage - 2页面故障并执行指令模拟。

supervisor 模式下可以操作 hypervisor 相关的寄存器吗，那这个是怎么处理呢，难道不是预先分配好，还需要动态分配吗

“Note that parts of the VM run in kernel mode, just like the highvisor, but with Stage-2 translation and trapping to Hyp mode enabled.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 注意到部分VM运行在内核模式，就像highvisor一样，但启用了Stage - 2翻译和捕获到Hyp模式。

所以 host os 是直接跑在非虚拟化环境中的，但是如何给每个 VM 打开 trapping to Hyp 和 stage-2 translation 还需要看下

“However, as shown in Section 5, this extra trap is not a significant performance cost on ARM.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 然而，正如第5节所示，这个额外的陷阱对于ARM来说并不是一个显著的性能代价。

虽然 host guest 之间切换涉及到两次 trap，但是不是主要的性能损耗原因

“Therefore, the highvisor explicitly manages the Hyp mode page tables to map any code executed in Hyp mode and any data structures shared between the highvisor and the lowvisor to the same virtual addresses in Hyp mode and in kernel mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 337) 因此，Highvisor显式地管理Hyp模式的页表，将Hyp模式中执行的任何代码以及Highvisor和Lowvisor之间共享的任何数据结构映射到Hyp模式和内核模式中的相同虚拟地址。

相同虚拟地址，相同物理地址

“Register state not affecting VM isolation can simply be context switched by saving the VM state and restoring the host state from memory when switching from a VM to the host and vice versa.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338) 不影响VM隔离的寄存器状态可以简单地通过保存VM状态和从内存中恢复主机状态来进行上下文切换，当从VM切换到主机时，反之亦然。

通过上下文切换来确保 VM 感觉自己独享 CPU，和用户态进程其实类似。只是上下文应该会多一点

“KVM/ARM configures access to all other sensitive state to trap to Hyp mode, so it can be emulated by the hypervisor.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338) KVM / ARM将对所有其他敏感状态的访问配置为捕获到Hyp模式，因此可以通过虚拟机管理程序进行模拟。

如果访问更高权限的，需要 trap 进入 kernel，这个是不是也可以借鉴在用户态 OS 中

“A world switch from the host to a VM performs the following actions: (1) store all host GP registers on the Hyp stack, (2) configure the VGIC for the VM, (3) configure the timers for the VM, (4) save all host-specific configuration registers onto the Hyp stack, (5) load the VM’s configuration registers onto the hardware, which can be done without affecting current execution, because Hyp mode uses its own configuration registers, separate from the host state, (6) configure Hyp mode to trap floating-point operations for lazy context switching, trap interrupts, trap CPU halt instructions (WFI/WFE), trap SMC instructions, trap specific configuration register accesses, and trap debug register accesses, (7) write VM-specific IDs into shadow ID registers, (8) set the Stage-2 page table base register (VTTBR) and enable Stage-2 address translation, (9) restore all guest GP registers, and (10) trap into either user or kernel mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338)

host 到 VM 的切换过程，有些地方没看懂，需要对着代码详细了解。相比 kernel 上下文切换是多了一些上下文报错，比如控制寄存器，timer，vgic 之类，其实切换一次成本还是比较高的

“The CPU will stay in the VM world until an event occurs, which triggers a trap into Hyp mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338) CPU会一直停留在VM世界中，直到事件发生，从而触发进入Hyp模式的陷阱。

这点可以看出，hypervisor 的调度应该是非抢占式的？查了下，kvm 借用 linux 的调度框架，那应该是抢占式的？vCPU 本质是一个 Linux 线程，那怎么感觉和在用户态跑 OS 越来越像了。但是 kvm 不会频繁切换 vCPU，因为切换一次的成本是比较高的，、

“(1) store all VM GP registers, (2) disable Stage-2 translation, (3) configure Hyp mode to not trap any register access or instructions, (4) save all VM-specific configuration registers, (5) load the host’s configuration registers onto the hardware, (6) configure the timers for the host, (7) save VM-specific VGIC state, (8) restore all host GP registers, and (9) trap into kernel mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338) ( 1 )存储所有VM的GP寄存器，( 2 )禁用Stage - 2翻译，( 3 )配置Hyp模式以避免捕获任何寄存器访问或指令，( 4 )保存所有VM特定的配置寄存器，( 5 )将主机的配置寄存器加载到硬件上，( 6 )为主机配置定时器，( 7 )保存VM特定的VGIC状态，( 8 )恢复所有主机的GP寄存器，( 9 )进入内核模式。

这是从 VM 切换回到 host 的操作，那按照这么说，VM 之间应该是不能切换的，所以 VM 到 Host 再返回去

“Stage-2 translation is disabled when running in the highvisor and lowviser because the highvisor has full control of the complete system and directly manages the host physical addresses.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338) 因为管理员完全控制整个系统，直接管理主机物理地址，所以在管理员和管理员中运行时，阶段2的翻译被禁用。

hypervisor 无论是在内核态还是 hyp 态是由权限访问所有物理地址的，内核一般通过恒等映射，hyp 中是不是可以直接访问物理地址

“In comparison, a bare metal hypervisor would be forced to either statically allocate memory to VMs or write an entire new memory allocation subsystem.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 338)

相比来说，KVM 可以动态灵活的分配并 map 内存，而 stage-1 hypervisor 通常是静态分配

“Any access outside of RAM regions allocated for the VM will trap to the hypervisor, which can route the access to a specific emulated device in QEMU based on the fault address.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) 分配给虚拟机的RAM区域外的任何访问都将被捕获到虚拟机管理程序，该管理程序可以根据故障地址将访问路由到QEMU中的特定模拟设备。

访问硬件地址，将会触发 page fault, trap 进入 hypervisor，有 hypervisor 进行路由，将 device data 传给 VM。这有个疑问是，每次都要路由吗，还是第一次 fault 之后进行 map，但是 map 的话似乎有问题，多个 VM 怎么共享设备呢，那就是要每次都由 hypervisor 处理，这个工作量似乎挺大

“When running in a VM, KVM/ARM configures the CPU to trap all hardware interrupts to Hyp mode.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) 当运行在虚拟机中时，KVM / ARM配置CPU将所有硬件中断捕获到Hyp模式。

所有的硬件中断都通过 hypervisor，timer 不确定，似乎有硬件虚拟化

“However, guest OSes will still attempt to access a GIC distributor to configure the GIC and to send IPIs from one virtual core to another. Such accesses will trap to the hypervisor and the hypervisor must emulate the distributor.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) 但是，客户操作系统仍然会尝试访问GIC分销商来配置GIC，并将IPI从一个虚拟核心发送到另一个虚拟核心。这样的访问将捕获到虚拟机管理程序，虚拟机管理程序必须模拟分销商。

应该是会触发一些 fault 然后 trap 吧

“but not necessarily required when simply switching between a VM and the hypervisor.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) 但简单地在虚拟机和虚拟机管理程序之间切换并不一定需要。

也就是说，从 A->Host->A 的性能要比 A->Host->B 好一些

“The initial unoptimized version of KVM/ARM uses a simplified approach which completely context switches all VGIC state including the list registers on each world switch.” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) KVM / ARM的初始版本使用了一种简化的方法，它完全上下文切换所有的VGIC状态，包括每个世界交换机上的列表寄存器。

不知道现在是否做了优化

“Unfortunately, due to architectural limitations, the virtual timers cannot directly raise virtual interrupts, but always raise hardware interrupts, which trap to the hypervisor” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) 遗憾的是，由于架构的限制，虚拟定时器不能直接引发虚拟中断，而总是引发硬件中断，这就给虚拟机管理程序带来了困扰。

回答了上面的问题，timer 中断也还是要通过 hypervisor

“The hardware only provides a single virtual timer per physical CPU, and multiple virtual CPUs may be multiplexed across this single hardware instance. To support virtual timers in this scenario, KVM/ARM detects unexpired timers when a VM traps to the hypervisor and leverages existing OS functionality to program a software timer at the time when the virtual timer would have otherwise fired, had the VM been left running. When such a software timer fires, a callback function is executed, which raises a virtual timer interrupt to the VM using the virtual distributor described above” (Dall 和 Nieh, 2014, p. 339) 硬件仅为每个物理CPU提供一个虚拟定时器，多个虚拟CPU可以跨此单一硬件实例进行复用。为了在这种情况下支持虚拟定时器，KVM / ARM在VM捕获到管理程序时检测到未过期的定时器，并利用现有的操作系统功能，在虚拟定时器本来会被触发的时候，在VM运行的情况下编程软件定时器。当这样的软件定时器触发时，执行回调函数，利用上面描述的虚拟分配器向VM发出虚拟定时器中断。

一个物理 cpu 上只能有一个虚拟定时器，为了解决一个 cpu 上多个 vCPU 的问题 （假设每个 vCPU 都定义了不同的 timer，都会触发，分不清是哪个 vCPU），只能通过 host OS 注册 timer 回调的方式，回调中对对应的 vCPU 发送中断。但是这样我有个新的疑问，就是 vCPU 上的虚拟中断是怎么做的呢，这不是通过硬件实现的吗
chatgpt 回答
是的：同一个物理 CPU 上可以 time-slice 跑多个 vCPU，
每个 vCPU 都“看起来”拥有自己的一套虚拟中断控制器（VGIC），
区分不是靠硬件并行，而是靠 vCPU 上下文 + hypervisor 切换。

也就是说，GIC 只有一套寄存器，完全靠上下文切换进行区分。再详细的 VGIC 和 vCPU 的工作方式就要进一步了解 VGIC 了

items.title: Optimizing the Design and Implementation of the Linux ARM Hypervisor
items.abstractNote: Modern hypervisor designs for both ARM and x86 virtualization rely on running an operating system kernel, the hypervisor OS kernel, to support hypervisor functionality. While x86 hypervisors effectively leverage architectural support to run the kernel, existing ARM hypervisors map poorly to the virtualization features of the ARM architecture, resulting in worse performance. We identify the key reason for this problem is the need to multiplex kernel mode state between the hypervisor and virtual machines, which each run their own kernel. To address this problem, we take a fundamentally different approach to hypervisor design that runs the hypervisor together with its OS kernel in a separate CPU mode from kernel mode. Using this approach, we redesign KVM/ARM to leverage a separate ARM CPU mode for running both the hypervisor and its OS kernel. We show what changes are required in Linux to implement this on current ARM hardware as well as how newer ARM architectural support can be used to support this approach without any changes to Linux other than to KVM/ARM itself. We show that our redesign and optimizations can result in an order of magnitude performance improvement for KVM/ARM, and can provide faster performance than x86 on key hypervisor operations. As a result, many aspects of our design have been successfully merged into mainline Linux.

items.title: When Idling is Ideal: Optimizing Tail-Latency for Heavy-Tailed Datacenter Workloads with Perséphone
items.abstractNote: This paper introduces Perséphone, a kernel-bypass OS scheduler designed to minimize tail latency for applications executing at microsecond-scale and exhibiting wide service time distributions. Perséphone integrates a new scheduling policy, Dynamic Application-aware Reserved Cores (DARC), that reserves cores for requests with short processing times. Unlike existing kernel-bypass schedulers, DARC is not work conserving. DARC profiles application requests and leaves a small number of cores idle when no short requests are in the queue, so when short requests do arrive, they are not blocked by longer-running ones. Counter-intuitively, leaving cores idle lets DARC maintain lower tail latencies at higher utilization, reducing the overall number of cores needed to serve the same workloads and consequently better utilizing the datacenter resources.

items.title: Caladan: Mitigating Interference at Microsecond Timescales
items.abstractNote: The conventional wisdom is that CPU resources such as cores, caches, and memory bandwidth must be partitioned to achieve performance isolation between tasks. Both the widespread availability of cache partitioning in modern CPUs and the recommended practice of pinning latency-sensitive applications to dedicated cores attest to this belief. In this paper, we show that resource partitioning is neither necessary nor sufﬁcient. Many applications experience bursty request patterns or phased behavior, drastically changing the amount and type of resources they need. Unfortunately, partitioning-based systems fail to react quickly enough to keep up with these changes, resulting in extreme spikes in latency and lost opportunities to increase CPU utilization.

items.title: Harmonizing Performance and Isolation in Microkernels with Efficient Intra-kernel Isolation and Communication
items.abstractNote: This paper presents UnderBridge, a redesign of traditional microkernel OSes to harmonize the tension between messaging performance and isolation. UnderBridge moves the OS components of a microkernel between user space and kernel space at runtime while enforcing consistent isolation. It retroﬁts Intel Memory Protection Key for Userspace (PKU) in kernel space to achieve such isolation efﬁciently and design a fast IPC mechanism across those OS components. Thanks to PKU’s extremely low overhead, the inter-process communication (IPC) roundtrip cost in UnderBridge can be as low as 109 cycles. We have designed and implemented a new microkernel called ChCore based on UnderBridge and have also ported UnderBridge to three mainstream microkernels, i.e., seL4, Google Zircon, and Fiasco.OC. Evaluations show that UnderBridge speeds up the IPC by 3.0× compared with the state-of-the-art (e.g., SkyBridge) and improves the performance of IPC-intensive applications by up to 13.1× for the above three microkernels.

notes.note:
1. Problem

1.1 论文要解决什么问题？

微内核 IPC 性能不高，进一步导致微内核相比宏内核性能差距很大。本文想通过降低 IPC 损耗，提升微内核性能。

1.2 现有方法为什么不够好？

现有方法主要还是通过软件方式优化，比如 seL4 中的 fast syscall ，寄存器放置 syscall 参数，避免频繁调度等方式，只能优化到每次 syscall 到 1500 cycles

之前该团队还提到了 (Gu 等; Mi 等, 2019) Skybridge ，使用了 x86 上的硬件机制，将时长降低到 400 cycles

总的来说，现有方法的 syscall/ipc 时间还是过长

1.3 应用背景 / 使用场景？

微内核

2. Motivation

2.1 为什么这个问题重要？

微内核有很好的稳定性和安全性，其将大部分操作系统服务都放到了用户态，使得即使某个服务挂掉不会造成整个系统崩溃。

但随之而来的是，访问每个服务都会涉及 IPC，大多数情况下是多次 IPC，使得系统性能很差。

如果能优化 IPC 性能，那微内核应用场景会非常广阔，既享受了微内核的安全性，又不会又太多性能损失，两全其美。

2.2 作者的切入点是什么？

作者的想法是，既然特权级切换会造成大量时间浪费，那直接将操作系统服务都放在内核态运行好了，这样不就和宏内核一样了吗？

当然需要做一些隔离设计，确保服务之间不会互相影响，互相访问。使用 intel 的 “MPK/PKU” (Gu 等, p. 402) 技术，将内存空间隔离，实现服务间的隔离

3. Key Idea (High-level)

3.1 用一句话概括贡献

提出了一种新的微内核操作系统服务架构，在保证安全性的前提下，极大降低了同步 IPC 调用的损耗，提高了系统性能

3.2 与 prior work 的本质区别

将操作系统服务放在了内核态

4. Design / Method

4.1 系统架构 / 算法流程

“Figure 3: The overview of ChCore based on UnderBridge” (Gu 等, p. 404)

4.2 核心机制

  • 将服务从 userspace 放回到 kernel space

“Instead, UnderBridge boosts IPC performance by putting the system servers, which are user-space processes in traditional microkernels, back into kernel space.” (Gu 等, p. 404)

  • 使用 MPK 机制确保服务之间隔离，从而不会像宏内核那样
  • 服务将自己的接口函数注册到 kernel 中，将函数地址注册到 kernel。其他服务通过 kernel 和服务建立连接，然后可以直接访问该服务了

5. Implementation

5.1 核心实现

  • 每个服务有自己执行域，使用 MPK 技术，可以用一个指令切换内存域，这样服务之间互相隔离。
  • 每个 server 运行在一个作用域中，作用域中的 data 放到了它自己的内存区域，但是 code 是放在了 kernel 的内存区域。

“In this way, the server cannot read/write its own code but can still execute it (i.e., execute-only memory) as MPK memory domains do not affect instruction fetching.” (Gu 等, p. 405)

  • 同时为了交互，服务之间有 shared memory，服务和 kernel 之间的接口函数
  • 通过 IPC Gate 调用，IPC Gate 具体实现参考。可以看到在调用过程中，通过 wrpku 指令切换内存域，是需要切换上下文的，但是应该只需要切换 callee 寄存器即可

“Figure 4: (a) A basic IPC gate for switching execution domains” (Gu 等, p. 406)

  • 安全性增强设计

“4 Enforcing Isolation in UnderBridge” (Gu 等, p. 406)

5.2 依赖 / 平台 / 硬件

5.3 实现难点

6. Evaluation

  • Benchmark / Dataset
  • Baseline
  • Metric
  • 核心结果（数字 + 结论）

7. Strengths

  • 将服务放到了内核态，完全颠覆了微内核设计，从而获得了很高的性能提升
  • 服务很灵活，可以在用户-内核态之间切换，通过 IPC Gate 应该可以不用修改代码。如果做这方面工作可以参考下，如何让模块兼容内核态和用户态

“Instead, UnderBridge enables server migration, which dynamically moves servers between user and kernel space. Each server is compiled as a position-independent executable, and the core kernel assigns disjoint virtual memory regions for different system servers.” (Gu 等, p. 405)

  • 将该机制移植到了流行的微内核中，证明它是可以用在微内核中的

“We also apply UnderBridge to three state-of-the-art microkernels, i.e., seL4 3, Zircon, and Fiasco.OC, to demonstrate the generality of the design. The porting effort is about 1000∼1500 LOC for each of them.” (Gu 等, p. 409)

8. Weaknesses / Limitations

  • 看起来 执行域 的数量是要预先设定好的

9. Takeaways

  • QNX 上能否移植呢，但是首先我要了解 QNX，这点还没做到
  • arm 上有类似实现可以做吗
  • 操作系统服务可以在 user-kernel 中灵活部署

“the performance of highly optimized IPC has reached less than 1500 cycles per roundtrip [13]. The state-of-the-art SkyBridge IPC design, which retrofits Intel vmfunc to optimize IPCs, has further reduced the IPC cost to around 400 cycles per roundtrip [62]. However, such cost is still considerable compared with the cost of invoking kernel components in monolithic kernels (e.g., calling function pointers takes around 24 cycles).” (Gu 等, p. 401)

IPC 性能相比函数调用差距太大

“The key idea is building isolated domains in supervisor mode while providing efficient cross-domain interactions, and enabling user-space system servers1 of a microkernel OS to run in those domains.” (Gu 等, p. 401) 关键思想是在管理模式下构建隔离域，同时提供高效的跨域交互，并使微内核操作系统的用户空间系统服务器1能够在这些域中运行。

核心思想是把服务放到内核态工作

“The microkernel can dynamically decide to run a server either in a user process or a kernel domain based on how performancecritical it is.” (Gu 等, p. 401) 微内核可以根据性能的关键程度动态决定在用户​​进程或内核域中运行服务器。

灵活性其实是组件化内核的最大优势，是否可以用在这些方面

Arceos 其实是可以作为操作系统服务的基础组件，比如用在 qnx 上

“After a detailed investigation, we observed that no matter in kernel space (Ring-0) or user space (Ring3), PKU-capable CPUs transparently enforce permission checks on memory accesses only if the User/Kernel (U/K) bit of the corresponding page table entry is User (means useraccessible).” (Gu 等, p. 402) 经过详细调查，我们发现，无论是在内核空间（Ring-0）还是用户空间（Ring3），只有当相应页表项的用户/内核（U/K）位为User（意味着用户可访问）时，具有PKU功能的CPU才会透明地对内存访问执行权限检查。

有一些 tricky 的做法

“return oriented programming” (Gu 等, p. 402) 面向返回的编程

比如这样，但是没懂什么意思，就是为了更加安全，防止出现用户态指令在内核态凑巧发生粘连
void foo() {

   bar();

}

“To do not bloat the TCB, we also prevent the in-kernel system servers from executing any privileged instruction.” (Gu 等, p. 402) 为了不使TCB臃肿，我们还防止内核系统服务器执行任何特权指令。

即使是在内核态执行，也不会使用任何特权指令，访问特权寄存器

“We leverage hardware virtualization and run ChCore in non-root mode and deploy a tiny secure monitor in root mode. For most privileged instructions that are not in the critical path, we configure them to trigger VMExit and enforce permission checks in the monitor.” (Gu 等, p. 402) 我们利用硬件虚拟化技术，在非根模式下运行ChCore，在根模式下部署一个小型的安全监控器。对于大部分不在关键路径中的特权指令，我们将其配置为触发VMExit并在监视器中执行权限检查。

是每个服务都对应一个 monitor 吗，还是说 chcore 本身只有一个服务

“UnderBridge also shows better performance than SkyBridge (up to 65%) and improves the performance of the above three microkernels by 2.5×∼13.1×.” (Gu 等, p. 402) 跨线桥也表现出比高空连廊(最高可达65 %)更好的性能，将上述3种微内核的性能提升了2。5 ×┐13 . 1 ×。

这个提升确实有点太大了，可以看一下是如何移植的，arm 上是否有类似机制。

“(b) A breakdown of seL4 fast-path IPC.” (Gu 等, p. 403) ( b ) seL4快速转发IPC故障。

这是怎么测出来的

“which is known to be an efficient implementation of microkernel IPC” (Gu 等, p. 403) 它被认为是微内核IPC的有效实现。

qnx 怎么能测一下

“In summary, the switches of privilege and address space in IPC bring considerable overhead, which motivates our lightweight IPC design to remove these switches.” (Gu 等, p. 403)

所以考虑既然特权级切换消耗大，那么就不做切换好了

“One executable memory page is always executable to any domain, even if PKRU forbids the domain from reading the page.” (Gu 等, p. 403) 一个可执行内存页对于任何域始终都是可执行的，即使 PKRU 禁止该域读取该页。

这是目前存在的一个 bug，需要补救

“To enable MPK checks in Ring-0, the User/Kernel (U/K) bits of all the corresponding page table entries in a four-level page table have to be set as User (i.e., 1).” (Gu 等, p. 403) 要在 Ring-0 中启用 MPK 检查，四级页表中所有相应页表条目的用户/内核 (U/K) 位必须设置为 User（即 1）。

这样对使用没有影响吗，还是说这个 flag 本身就没有被完全利用起来，不会影响在内核态使用，x86 本身的架构还真不太清楚

“SFI (Software Fault Isolation)” (Gu 等, p. 403) SFI（软件故障隔离）

SFI（Software Fault Isolation，软件故障隔离）是一类通过软件手段实现内存与控制流隔离的安全技术，目标是在不依赖硬件虚拟化或进程隔离的情况下，把“不可信代码”的破坏范围限制在一个安全沙箱里。

用来实现独立 domain，但是纯软件手段，所以比 wrpku 效率更低，会带来一些额外的消耗

“The cost of wrpkru is the closest to indirect call, which is used to invoke kernel components (with function pointers) in monolithic kernels.” (Gu 等, p. 404) wrpkru 的成本最接近间接调用，它用于调用单片内核中的内核组件（带有函数指针）。

使用 wrpku 指令近似代替 syscall 或者宏内核函数调用，本质还是在宏内核前提下，尽可能的实现隔离

“The goal of UnderBridge is to optimize the synchronous IPC2 while simultaneously maintaining strong isolation.” (Gu 等, p. 404) UnderBridge 的目标是优化同步 IPC2，同时保持强隔离。

目前主流的 kernel 都是同步 syscall ，所以异步 kernel 有一些空间

items.title: The Benefits and Limitations of User Interrupts for Preemptive Userspace Scheduling
items.abstractNote: Preemptive scheduling promises to mitigate head-of-line blocking and enable flexible scheduling while retaining a simple programming model. Despite this, preemption is underutilized in server-side software today. Instead, high-performance datacenter systems and language runtimes often rely on cooperative concurrency, or else use preemption only at very coarse timescales, limiting its effectiveness. A key reason that preemption is underutilized today is that existing preemption mechanisms have high and unpredictable overheads.

notes.note:
1. 论文做了什么工作（What they did）

论文要解决的问题很明确：服务器端/数据中心软件需要更细粒度的抢占式调度来降低 tail latency、缓解 head-of-line blocking，但现实中抢占在用户态 runtime 里“用不起来”，关键原因是现有用户态抢占机制开销高且不可预测。

作者围绕 Intel Sapphire Rapids 的新特性 User Interrupts (UINTR) 展开，做了三类工作：

(1) 系统化比较 3 种用户态抢占机制（Section 2）

用户态调度可用的机制被归纳为三类，并解释其开销来源与行为差异：

  • Signals（信号）：需要内核参与，发送与接收涉及多次 user/kernel 切换 → 开销大且影响缓存/分支预测。
  • Compiler instrumentation（编译器插桩/polling）：在函数入口、循环回边插入检查点，timer 线程写共享变量，线程在 probe 处轮询是否该让出 CPU → 每次检查便宜，但开销和及时性依赖控制流，并且需要复杂调参（Concord 的 subloops、loop unrolling 等）。
  • User interrupts（用户中断）：用户态之间发送/接收 IPI，注册后收发路径不再进入内核 → 显著降低每次抢占触发开销，且更一致。

作者用 microbenchmark 定量给出关键结论（在你贴的文本里已经出现）：

  • 信号每次触发的基本开销约 2.4 µs
  • 用户中断每次触发约 0.4 µs 并用 Figure 1 展示：在“≤10% slowdown”预算下，UINTR 支持到 5 µs quantum，而 signals 只能到大约 30 µs quantum。

(2) 做了两个真实的“可抢占用户态调度器”（Section 3）

目的不是只跑微基准，而是看“放进真实 runtime 里”是否真的能带来端到端收益，以及会遇到什么系统约束。

  • Aspen-KB：在 Caladan（kernel-bypass runtime，C 实现，微秒级延迟导向）上扩展，加入：

    • timer core + UINTR 抢占
    • 两级队列（new queue vs preempted queue）避免 preempted 任务挡住新任务（避免 HOL blocking）
    • 支持对照：同一 runtime 下同时实现 signals 与 Concord 插桩，实现 apples-to-apples 比较（避免“不同语言/不同调度策略”混淆）

  • Aspen-Go：在 Go runtime（强调生产易用性、依赖 Linux network stack）上做最小修改：

    • sysmon 线程忙等以实现更细粒度定时
    • 用 UINTR 替换/对照 signals
    • 提高 netpoller 频率（如 100 µs）以减少网络栈排队带来的 HOL blocking
    • 在 Lock/Unlock 周围禁抢占，避免非可重入临界区被打断

(3) 在真实应用上评估（Section 4）

使用真实 workload：

  • Aspen-KB：RocksDB（GET/SCAN bimodal）、C++ DataFrame（多任务类型）
  • Aspen-Go：BadgerDB（Go KV，GET/RangeSCAN bimodal） 指标围绕 tail latency 与 throughput，并分解单次抢占成本、量化最佳 quantum、评估设计取舍（4 个问题在 §4 开头列得很清楚）。

2. 论文的创新点（Contributions / What’s new）

结合你给的正文（Introduction/Section 2/3），这篇论文的创新点不是“发明 UINTR”，而是：

创新点 1：把“UINTR 用于用户态抢占调度”的收益/边界讲透，并与插桩机制做了首次系统化 tradeoff 对比

论文明确声称：

  • 不是第一个用 UINTR 做抢占的人（提到 Junction 等），
  • 但是第一个系统分析 UINTR vs compiler instrumentation 的权衡，并且把它放到一个“被广泛使用的 runtime：Go”里，讨论真实约束。

这点很重要：之前很多工作要么只说 signals vs 新机制，要么在特定系统里用，但没有把“插桩派（Concord/Go 老路线）”与“异步中断派（UINTR）”的优劣边界讲清。

创新点 2：关键测量结论：UINTR 把抢占触发开销从微秒级大幅降到亚微秒，并显著提升一致性

论文用实验给出“量级变化”的证据：

  • 2.4 µs → 0.4 µs 的 per-preemption 基本成本变化
    并解释开销来源：内核路径、cache miss、branch mispredict 等；还给出 perf 观察（如 L1 miss、branch mispredict 降低）。

它不仅告诉你“更快”，也告诉你“为什么更稳定、更可预测”。

创新点 3：工程化系统贡献：两个调度器覆盖两种设计空间，并提供 apples-to-apples 对照平台

  • Aspen-KB：让你在同一个 runtime、同一套调度策略下对照 signals / UINTR / instrumentation，排除“算法差异、语言差异、网络栈差异”等混淆因素。
  • Aspen-Go：证明“把 UINTR 塞进一个现实主流 runtime 并不自动带来巨大收益”，从而把 limitations 变成结论，而不是猜测。

创新点 4（这篇论文最有价值的“洞察”）：UINTR 不是 panacea——系统其它层会决定细粒度抢占是否真正有效

论文在 Introduction 就点名：当上层软件层（尤其 Go 的设计、Linux 网络栈交互、队列结构等）限制了你能用的调度策略时：

  • 即便抢占触发变便宜，缩短 quantum 也可能“得不偿失/适得其反”
  • 在 Go 场景中，<50 µs 的 quantum 会因为 runtime 开销、netpoll 代价等变得反效果，导致 UINTR 的优势被“系统结构性限制”吞掉

这是标题里 “limitations” 的核心落点：机制改进 ≠ 系统收益，收益需要全栈配合（网络栈、队列组织、可抢占区域、锁、TLS/库函数等）。

3. 论文总结出的限制（Limitations 的具体来源，来自你贴的 Section 3.1/3.3）

从文本里已经能明确看到作者把限制拆成 4 类“设计因素”，这些基本就是论文对 limitations 的系统化解释：

  1. Unnecessary preemptions（不必要抢占）
    抢占不总是需要；如果没有其他可运行任务，抢占只会增加 overhead。要避免它，timer core 需要能看到“是否有排队工作、是否刚发生 context switch、是否有网络包”等。但在 Go + OS network stack 场景下，sysmon 很难判断是否有包排队 → 容易产生无意义抢占。
  2. Non-preemptible code（不可抢占/不可重入区域）
    包括 scheduler 持锁、malloc/TLS 相关代码等。UINTR 有硬件 deferral（clui/stui）与 interrupt coalescing 的潜力，但论文指出：
  • stui+clui 约 18 ns，虽然比 mask/unmask signals 便宜，但在 malloc/free 很频繁的 workload（如 RocksDB GET）里仍可能导致明显 slowdown（文中给了 7% vs software deferral 的对比）。
  1. Extended registers（扩展寄存器保存恢复）
    UINTR 只保存 RIP/RSP/flags，调度器要自己保存 SIMD/AVX-512 等扩展寄存器。作者采取“保守全保存”，每线程状态变大（~2KB），但测得多数情况下可接受（细节在 Appendix A）。
  2. Head-of-line blocking 仍可能发生
    即使能打断 CPU 上的任务，如果网络包/新任务仍在网络栈或队列里排队，HOL 仍存在。Aspen-KB 用 kernel-bypass + 每次抢占后 poll + 新/旧两级队列来解决；Go 因为 netpoll 需要系统调用（≥2 µs/次），不能每次抢占都 poll，只能提高 sysmon poll 频率（100 µs），但仍会因为 global queue 结构导致新就绪 goroutine 排在 preempted goroutine 后面。

4. 你写“创新点”时可以怎么落笔（可直接用）

你可以把创新点写成 3 条（很像论文贡献列表的风格）：

  • 机制层面：提出并量化用户中断用于用户态抢占的优势，证明其 per-preemption 开销从 2.4 µs 降至 0.4 µs，且 overhead 更一致，从而支持更细粒度抢占。
  • 系统层面：实现两个基于 UINTR 的用户态抢占调度器 Aspen-KB（Caladan/kern-bypass）与 Aspen-Go（Go runtime），并在同一 runtime 内提供 signals/插桩对照，实现公平对比。
  • 洞察/限制：揭示 UINTR 并非万能；当 runtime/网络栈/队列策略/不可抢占区等上层设计限制调度策略时，缩短 quantum 可能无效甚至反效果，因此 UINTR 的收益依赖全栈调度与 I/O 架构配合。

如果你想把总结做得“更像精读”，你接下来只要再把 nsdi25-guo.txt 里 §4.1 ���关键结果段落（以及图表对应的结论文字）多贴一点，我可以把每个 workload 下的结论（谁赢、最佳 quantum 大概多少、tail/throughput 提升幅度）也按点列出来，形成一份可直接做汇报/读书报告的内容。

“Datacenter applications today suffer from high tail latency.” (Guo 等, p. 1015)

(Guo 等; Kaffes 等; Jia 等, 2024) 尝试解决的问题

这篇文章重点看下他通过用户态中断实现的调度是如何做的

“However, preemption is underutilized today.” (Guo 等, p. 1015) 然而，抢占目前尚未得到充分利用。

用户态中断，主要是 server 或者这种服务器上的软件任务太多，不可能每个任务都创建线程，只能作为协程

“Though kernel schedulers do implement preemption, they typically do so only at millisecond timescales, which is not sufficient to ensure sub-millisecond tail latencies. Furthermore, kernel-based scheduling adds microseconds of overhead to scheduling operations” (Guo 等, p. 1015) 尽管内核调度程序确实实现了抢占，但它们通常仅在毫秒时间尺度上实现，这不足以确保亚毫秒级尾部延迟。此外，基于内核的调度增加了调度操作的微秒开销

主要还是线程消耗太高，同时 kernel 负责整个系统，不够灵活，如果改成 us 级调度，会极大影响性能

“We find that user interrupts consistently provide lower overhead than signals, across all programs we evaluated. While the overhead of compiler instrumentation can be lower than that of user interrupts for very fine-grained preemption with some programs, this overhead varies significantly and can be quite high. Furthermore, striking a good balance between preemption overhead and timeliness can require careful tuning of multiple parameters. While it may be possible to mitigate some of these issues with more sophisticated compiler techniques, with existing approaches to compiler instrumentation, finegrained preemption remains fragile, entailing unpredictable and potentially high costs. User interrupts offer a compelling alternative due to their consistent overheads, which remain low for all but the highest preemption frequencies.” (Guo 等, p. 1019) 我们发现，在我们评估的所有程序中，用户中断始终提供比信号更低的开销。虽然对于某些程序来说，编译器检测的开销可能低于用于非常细粒度抢占的用户中断的开销，但这种开销变化很大并且可能相当高。此外，在抢占开销和及时性之间取得良好的平衡可能需要仔细调整多个参数。虽然可以使用更复杂的编译器技术来缓解其中一些问题，但使用现有的编译器检测方法，细粒度抢占仍然很脆弱，导致不可预测且可能会产生高昂的成本。用户中断提供了一个引人注目的替代方案，因为它们具有一致的开销，除了最高的抢占频率之外，其开销仍然很低。

这段比较不是重点，直接看结论

“First, Aspen-KB extends Caladan [33], a user-level runtime and scheduler implemented in C that uses kernel-bypass networking and is heavily optimized to achieve microsecond-scale latencies.” (Guo 等, p. 1019) 首先，Aspen-KB 扩展了 Caladan [33]，这是一个用 C 语言实现的用户级运行时和调度程序，它使用内核旁路网络，并经过大量优化以实现微秒级的延迟。

这个可以看下，在 c 上实现的用户态调度器

“Second, Aspen-Go extends the popular Go runtime, which relies on the underlying operating system’s network stack and is designed for programmer productivity rather than bleeding-edge performance.” (Guo 等, p. 1019) 其次，Aspen-Go 扩展了流行的 Go 运行时，它依赖于底层操作系统的网络堆栈，专为程序员的生产力而不是尖端性能而设计。

这个提供了实际应用的价值

用户态相关工作和微内核工作相关度挺高

“To enable preemptive scheduling, both runtime systems dedicate one core in each runtime to act as the timer core. The timer core periodically sends user interrupts to runtime cores, preempting the currently running user threads. Note that the timer core is not required to process incoming or outgoing packets (though in Go it may), enabling the timer core to scale to support larger numbers of cores than in systems where the timer core is also responsible for processing all incoming network traffic and dispatching packets to cores” (Guo 等, p. 1019) 为了实现抢占式调度，两个运行时系统都在每个运行时中专门分配一个核心作为定时器核心。定时器核心定期向运行时核心发送用户中断，抢占当前正在运行的用户线程。请注意，定时器核心不需要处理传入或传出数据包（尽管在 Go 中可能如此），这使得定时器核心能够扩展以支持比定时器核心还负责处理所有传入网络流量并将数据包分派到核心的系统更多的核心数量

这两个 runtime 已经通过 timer core 实现了中断，一个 core 专门用来处理 timer 中断然后发送中断到其他线程，感觉好奢侈，永远不可能用在嵌入式系统中

“However, preemption is not always necessary—for example when there are no queued tasks for a core to run or when a thread has just yielded voluntarily—and preempting unnecessarily slows down running tasks. Eliminating these unnecessary preemptions can significantly reduce overhead.” (Guo 等, p. 1019) 然而，抢占并不总是必要的——例如，当没有队列任务可供核心运行或线程刚刚自愿让出时——并且抢占不必要地减慢了正在运行的任务。消除这些不必要的抢占可以显着减少开销。

中断进来检查下，如果不需要抢占就不做任何操作

“Scheduler code that holds locks. Since the thread scheduler runs in userspace, a user interrupt may arrive while a thread is executing scheduler code. If that thread holds a lock that protects scheduler state, then it may be unsafe to preempt it, because it will not be possible to acquire the scheduler’s lock to reenter the scheduler and context switch to a different user-level thread. This is an example of non-reentrant code.” (Guo 等, p. 1019) 持有锁的调度器代码。由于线程调度器运行在用户空间，当线程执行调度器代码时，用户中断可能到达。如果该线程持有保护调度器状态的锁，那么抢占它可能是不安全的，因为它将无法获得调度器的锁来重新进入调度器和上下文切换到不同的用户级线程。这是一个非重入性代码的例子。

之前移植 arceos 的时候也遇到类似问题了

“If a signal arrives during one of these regions, the signal handler defers the preemption until the user-level thread exits the region” (Guo 等, p. 1020) 如果信号在其中一个区域内到达，则信号处理器延迟抢占，直到用户级线程退出该区域。

跳过非安全区域，确保抢占安全，但是这样做工作量挺高

“Deferring preemption in hardware would slow down RocksDB GET requests by 7%, whereas deferring preemption in software adds only 1-2 ns of overhead for each region of code (less than 1% slowdown overall).” (Guo 等, p. 1020) 硬件延迟抢占会使RocksDB的GET请求减慢7 %，而软件延迟抢占对代码(总体降幅小于1 %)的每个区域只增加1 ~ 2ns的开销。

这一段没看懂，意思是不给中断处理器回复，反而会增加消耗？这是什么道理。还有这个软件实现是什么意思

items.title: Achieving Microsecond-Scale Tail Latency Efficiently with Approximate Optimal Scheduling
items.abstractNote: Datacenter applications expect microsecond-scale service times and tightly bound tail latency, with future workloads expected to be even more demanding. To address this challenge, state-of-the-art runtimes employ theoretically optimal scheduling policies, namely a single request queue and strict preemption.

items.conferenceName: SOSP '23: 29th Symposium on Operating Systems Principles

attachments.title: PDF

notes.note:
“Similarly, preemptive scheduling in Shinjuku imposes a 20% throughput penalty at a scheduling quantum of 5μs, and a 50% throughput penalty at a quantum of 2μs.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 466)

确实频繁的抢占会造成很大吞吐量的损失

“First, Concord’s compiler-enforced cooperation approximates precise preemption using asynchronous communication between threads.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 467)

通过异步信号实现抢占，这样怎么实现精确的微秒级呢

“Second, Concord leverages Join-Bounded Shortest Queue (JBSQ) scheduling [40] and approximates a single queue with bounded core-local queues.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 467) 其次，Concord利用联合有界最短队列( Join-Bounded Shortest Queue，JBSQ )调度[ 40 ]，用有界的核心-局部队列近似单个队列。

这个是啥意思，根据后面缓存一致性，看起来是解决多核的某个问题？

“Finally, the Concord dispatcher —a thread normally dedicated to enqueueing requests—is work-conserving and runs application logic when all worker threads are busy.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 467) 最后，Concord调度器- -一个通常用于处理请求的线程- -是省力的，并且在所有工作线程繁忙时运行应用逻辑。

还是需要一个专门的分配器

相比之前的实现，是一个优化版本的，这样在解决一定长尾问题的情况下，尽量不影响吞吐量

“We consider a system with 1 dedicated dispatcher thread and n worker threads, all of which are pinned to individual CPU cores.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 467)

这也是 shinjuku 的设计模型

“Today, there exist two approaches for implementing preemption at the microsecond scale—interrupts and code instrumentation —that introduce significant overheads via the components cnotif and cproc,” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 468) 如今，有两种方法可以实现微秒级的抢占——中断和代码检测——这两种方法通过组件 cnotif 和 cproc 引入了显着的开销，

后者可以理解为运行一段时间就主动停止并运行某段函数吗？

“In interrupt-based systems, the dispatcher sends an interprocessor interrupt (IPI) to a worker whenever it has reached the desired scheduling quantum.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 468) 在基于中断的系统中，每当工作程序达到所需的调度量时，调度程序都会向工作程序发送处理器间中断 (IPI)。

每 5us 都会·发送一次 IPI 给 worker，触发中断调度。那这么说，每个核心上只能运行一个 worker 了，也挺受限制的

“cproc is a fixed fraction of the service time and leads to a throughput overhead independent of the scheduling quantum.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 468) cproc 是服务时间的固定部分，并导致与调度量无关的吞吐量开销。

因为是在编译是加入的，所以固定运行一段时间就会触发，所以和中断间隔是没关系的。换句话说，它的抢占周期应该是无法修改的

“since the probes are inserted approximately every 200 instructions, which is substantially smaller than 1μs.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 469) 因为探针大约每 200 条指令插入一次，远小于 1μs。固定时间，非常短的时间

“optimal single queue” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 469) 这个单一队列应该是已经在每个核心上了，避免 dispatcher 进行分配，造成通信上的时间损失

“Second, Join-Bounded Shortest Queue (JBSQ) scheduling (§3.2) adds bounded corelocal queues to approximate a single queue;” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 469) 其次，Join-Bounded Shortest Queue (JBSQ) 调度（第 3.2 节）添加有界 corelocal 队列以近似单个队列；

我的理解是将几个核心上所有的任务近似的看作是一个队列

“Finally, the Concorddispatcher (§3.3) is work-conserving and steals work from the global single queue when all worker threads are busy.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 469) 最后，Concorddispatcher（第 3.3 节）会节省工作，并在所有工作线程都忙时从全局单个队列中窃取工作。

dispatcher 也会做一些工作，避免独占一个核心浪费，在核心数量少的场景提升很大

“In Concord, scheduling decisions are communicated between workers Wi and the dispatcher D via a per-core dedicated cache line Li , instead of IPIs.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 470) 在 Concord 中，调度决策通过每核专用缓存线 Li 而不是 IPI 在工作线程 Wi 和调度程序 D 之间进行通信。

翻来覆去的还是这些通信方式，这篇文章的贡献我感觉是提供了一种量化分析的方法，但本质上没有什么特别惊艳的设计

“Concord’s compiler instrumentation ensures application code running on Wi periodically checks cache line Li for a preemption signal from the dispatcher.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 470) Concord 的编译器工具可确保 Wi 上运行的应用程序代码定期检查缓存线 Li 是否有来自调度程序的抢占信号。

定期轮询，如果轮询的足够快，可以接近中断的精度

“This minimization does not significantly increase cproc because, unlike an rdtsc call, which always costs ≈ 30 cycles, the cache line Li is in the L1 cache of worker Wi for all but the final check, so most checks consist of an L1 cache hit plus a compare, i.e., 2 cycles. The final check (after which the request yields), incurs a Read after Write cache-coherence miss since it is the first check after the dispatcher writes to Li .” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 470) 这种最小化不会显着增加 cproc，因为与 rdtsc 调用不同，它总是花费约 30 个周期，除了最终检查之外，缓存行 Li 都位于工作线程 Wi 的 L1 缓存中，因此大多数检查由 L1 缓存命中加上比较组成，即 2 个周期。最终检查（在此之后请求产生）会导致写入后读取缓存一致性缺失，因为这是调度程序写入 Li 后的第一次检查。

大多数情况下轮询的开销是非常小的，如果修改后会造成，缓存未命中，此时才会增加，但是这样比发送 IPI 中断要低很多，所以综合起来，在 us 级抢占的前提下，损耗是要低的

“Concord guarantees that preemption is avoided within external calls by construction, since the compiler has full control over the portions of code it instruments.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 471) Concord 保证通过构造在外部调用中避免抢占，因为编译器可以完全控制它所检测的代码部分。

调用其他库的时候不会发生抢占，这样可以确保抢占发生时都处于 concord 代码中

“For example, to achieve safety in LevelDB we only had to add a total of 4 lines of code that incremented/decremented a counter whenever a mutex was locked/unlocked in the application code.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 471) 例如，为了在 LevelDB 中实现安全性，我们只需添加总共 4 行代码，每当应用程序代码中锁定/解锁互斥锁时，这些代码就会递增/递减计数器。

这是在编译器中实现的吗，确保在持有锁的时候不会被抢占

“To avoid preemption while holding application locks developers must modify their code” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 471) 为了避免在持有应用程序锁时发生抢占，开发人员必须修改其代码

持有锁的时候被抢占，可能会造成其他任务卡住

“Prior work has already explored the use of JBSQ(k) in scenarios where the dispatcher was located on either a programmable switch [40] or a smartNIC [27, 30].” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 472) 先前的工作已经探索了 JBSQ(k) 在调度程序位于可编程交换机 [40] 或 smartNIC [27, 30] 上的场景中的使用。

这个调度策略可以后续看下

“rdtsc()-based instrumentation is necessary since there is no external agent to send preemption signals to the dispatcher and so it must be able to self-preempt.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 472) 基于 rdtsc() 的检测是必要的，因为没有外部代理向调度程序发送抢占信号，因此它必须能够自我抢占。

还是以来 rdtsc 指令进行抢占

“Stall-Free Workers” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 471) 无摊位工人

worker 始终有任务，不需要完成任务后告知 dispatcher，再进行分配

“For instance, any periodic event, such as garbage collection and timer management or Unix signals and global synchronization mechanisms, implemented through membarrier() on Linux” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 478) 例如，任何周期性事件，例如垃圾收集和计时器管理或 Unix 信号和全局同步机制，在 Linux 上通过 membarrier() 实现

这倒是挺有意思，之前没有想过这种周期性任务是如何执行的

“This is the case for confidential VMs [2, 31] in which the hypervisor is considered potentially malicious and can inject virtual interrupts at any point in time.” (Iyer 等, 2023, p. 478) 机密虚拟机就是这种情况 [2, 31]，其中虚拟机管理程序被认为是潜在恶意的，并且可以在任何时间点注入虚拟中断。

hypervisor 可以注入中断，但是如何执行是否还是由 kernel 本身决定的

items.title: Safe and usable kernel extensions with Rex
items.abstractNote: Safe kernel extensions have gained significant traction, evolving from simple packet filters to large, complex programs that customize storage, networking, and scheduling. Existing kernel extension mechanisms like eBPF rely on in-kernel verifiers to ensure safety of kernel extensions by static verification using symbolic execution. We identify significant usability issues -- safe extensions being rejected by the verifier -- due to the language-verifier gap, a mismatch between developers' expectation of program safety provided by a contract with the programming language, and the verifier's expectation. We present Rex, a new kernel extension framework that closes the language-verifier gap and improves the usability of kernel extensions in terms of programming experience and maintainability. Rex builds upon language-based safety to provide safety properties desired by kernel extensions, along with a lightweight extralingual runtime for properties that are unsuitable for static analysis, including safe exception handling, stack safety, and termination. With Rex, kernel extensions are written in safe Rust and interact with the kernel via a safe interface provided by Rex's kernel crate. No separate static verification is needed. Rex addresses usability issues of eBPF kernel extensions without compromising performance.

items.title: Skyloft: A General High-Efficient Scheduling Framework in User Space
items.abstractNote: Skyloft is a general and highly efficient user-space scheduling framework. It leverages user-mode interrupt to deliver and process hardware timers directly in user space. This capability enables Skyloft to achieve µs-scale preemption. Skyloft offers a set of scheduling interfaces that supports different scheduling policies, including both preemptive and nonpreemptive ones. Operating as a user-space scheduling framework, Skyloft is compatible with Linux and integrates seamlessly with high-performance I/O frameworks like DPDK.

“Other user-space schedulers [8, 52] rely on Linux signals for preemption, which introduces extra overheads.” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 1) 其他用户空间调度程序 [8, 52] 依赖 Linux 信号进行抢占，这会带来额外的开销。

seL4 中可以这么设计，切换的时候，可以直接切换，也可以通过 kernel 切换。根据任务是否是 kernel 可感知的任务决定通过什么方式切换。也可能和多核相关，每个核心至少有一个 seL4 任务，但是每个核心上是否只运行一个任务，还需要想一想

“Single Binding Rule: No two or more active kernel threads may be bound to the same isolated core simultaneously.” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 6) 单一绑定规则：两个或多个活动内核线程不能同时绑定到同一个隔离核心。

目前 seL4 上也是一样，通过 helper 任务控制同时只有一个 runnable 任务，如果改成用户态调度后，是否可以做成两级调度，内核可感知和纯用户态任务？

“To enforce the binding rule when launching a new application, Skyloft binds newly created kernel threads to isolated cores and immediately suspends them, making them inactive until they are later activated.” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 6) 为了在启动新应用程序时强制执行绑定规则，Skyloft 将新创建的内核线程绑定到隔离核心并立即挂起它们，使它们处于非活动状态，直到稍后激活它们。

这个做法其实和现在 arceos on seL4 也是类似的。

““However, if the next thread is from a different application, an application switch is required.” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 6), This involves setting the current application’s active kernel thread to inactive (suspending it) and activating (waking up) the inactive kernel thread of the target application.” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 6) 这涉及将当前应用程序的活动内核线程设置为不活动（挂起）并激活（唤醒）目标应用程序的不活动内核线程。

这和现在我的做法也是类似的

“Since the overhead of switching between applications is considerably higher than switching within the same application (§5.4), minimizing inter-application thread switching is an important metric for scheduling policies to consider.” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 6) 由于应用程序之间的切换开销远高于同一应用程序内的切换开销（第 5.4 节），因此最小化应用程序间线程切换是调度策略需要考虑的一个重要指标。

参照下 skyloft 的用户态线程设计

“Skyloft implements these operations within a Linux kernel module, providing access to these functionalities for the Skyloft scheduler through the ioctl() interface (§4.2).” (Jia 等, 2024, p. 7)

这部分在 seL4 中应该可以完全由用户态实现?

这个和 ldh 的工作其实也有些类似，其实 ldh 的工作包装好发会议感觉也是没问题的

items.title: Shinjuku: Preemptive Scheduling for µsecond-scale Tail Latency
items.abstractNote: The recently proposed dataplanes for microsecond scale applications, such as IX and ZygOS, use non-preemptive policies to schedule requests to cores. For the many realworld scenarios where request service times follow distributions with high dispersion or a heavy tail, they allow short requests to be blocked behind long requests, which leads to poor tail latency.

attachments.title: PDF
attachments.path: /Users/croak/Zotero/storage/2M67HNPY/Kaffes 等 - Shinjuku Preemptive Scheduling for µsecond-scale Tail Latency.pdf

notes.note:
“Tail Latency” (Kaffes 等, p. 344)

指所有任务中延迟最大的那一小撮任务，可能调度造成的，也可能是任务本身造成的等待之类。可能会造成后续任务延迟

“This allows Shinjuku to implement centralized scheduling policies that preempt requests as often as every 5μsec” (Kaffes 等, p. 345) 这使得 Shinjuku 能够实施集中调度策略，每 5 微秒抢占一次请求

5 us 一次时钟中断是否消耗太高了呢

“Theory tells us that such workloads do best in terms of tail latency under processor sharing (PS) [57], where all requests receive a fine-grain, fair fraction of the available processing capacity.” (Kaffes 等, p. 346) 理论告诉我们，此类工作负载在处理器共享（PS）[57]下的尾部延迟方面表现最好，其中所有请求都接收可用处理能力的细粒度、公平的部分。

大概理解就是上述非抢占式调度策略虽然对高并发场景有一些优化，但是还是对长尾问题还是有限，需要抢占式调度

“To approximate PS, we need preemption, as built into any modern kernel scheduler including Linux.” (Kaffes 等, p. 346) 为了近似 PS，我们需要抢占，它内置于包括 Linux 在内的任何现代内核调度程序中。

这里说明需要抢占

“However, it is difficult to yield often enough during requests with longer processing times and without many blocking I/O calls, which are precisely the requests impacting tail latency.” (Kaffes 等, p. 346) 然而，在处理时间较长且没有大量阻塞 I/O 调用的请求期间，很难经常产生足够的收益，而这些正是影响尾部延迟的请求。

协程只能在主动 yield 时候调度，如果该任务不是 IO 型任务，那么任务会一直执行，不会让开

“Shinjuku deemphasizes RSS in favor of true centralized scheduling by one or more dedicated dispatcher threads with centralized knowledge of load and service time distribution.” (Kaffes 等, p. 346) Shinjuku 不再强调 RSS，而是支持通过一个或多个专用调度程序线程进行真正的集中调度，这些调度程序线程具有负载和服务时间分布的集中知识。

通过一个专用的线程进行调度分配，是否类似目前我用的一个 helper 函数

“It leverages hardware support for virtualization—specifically posted interruptsto achieve preemption overheads of 298 cycles in the dispatcher core and 1,212 cycles in worker cores. The single address space architecture allows us to optimize context switches down to 110 cycles” (Kaffes 等, p. 346) 它利用虚拟化的硬件支持——特别是发布中断，以在调度程序核心中实现 298 个周期的抢占开销，在工作核心中实现 1,212 个周期的抢占开销。单一地址空间架构允许我们将上下文切换优化至 110 个周期

seL4 上无法实现 us 级抢占，除非做一些修改，否则频繁进入中断的消耗无法承受

“Shinjuku implements the cPRE policies (see §3.4) that achieve the best of both worlds between PS and c-FCFS as shown in Figures 1 and 2.” (Kaffes 等, p. 348) 新宿区实施了 cPRE 政策（参见第 3.4 节），该政策在 PS 和 c-FCFS 之间实现了两全其美，如图 1 和图 2 所示。

缝合了下，哪种策略更好使用哪种，但是是怎么分辨使用哪种调度策略的呢？

“1) Implement low-overhead preemption and context switching mechanisms for user-level threads.” (Kaffes 等, p. 348) 1) 为用户级线程实现低开销的抢占和上下文切换机制。

这个才是最大的贡献，如何降低抢占带来的性能损失

“Shinjuku1 is a single-address space operating system for low-latency applications.” (Kaffes 等, p. 348) Shinjuku1 是一个用于低延迟应用程序的单地址空间操作系统。

类似 unikernel ?

“Shinjuku system design.” (Kaffes 等, p. 348) 看起来是每个 threads 会跑在一个核心上，并且是固定的

“Similar to IX and ZygOS, Shinjuku leverages the Dune system for process virtualization [15]. With Dune, Linux and the Dune kernel module run in VMX root mode ring 0, where a hypervisor would run in a virtualized system. Shinjuku runs in VMX non-root mode ring 0, where a guest OS would run. This allows it to use very low overhead interrupts while separating the control from the data plane.” (Kaffes 等, p. 349)

通过 vmx 技术将 guest OS 运行在 ring0 模式，可以理解为更接近直接运行在硬件的模式

“A naive approach would be for the dispatcher to notify workers using Linux signals.” (Kaffes 等, p. 349) 一种简单的方法是调度员使用 Linux 信号通知工作人员。

没太弄明白这段，这套系统也不是运行在 Linux 上的，也不是 Linux 的应用。主要是我对于虚拟化的技术完全不了解，所以不明白这里的机制

“Optimized interrupt sending.” (Kaffes 等, p. 349) 和中断接收优化都修改了

Dune 是一个 Kernel module，类似 KVM

“Table 1 presents the result of combining the senderside and receiver-side optimization for the interrupt delivery used to support preemption in Shinjuku. The low sender-side overhead (298 cycles) makes it practical to build a centralized, preemptive dispatcher that handles millions of scheduling actions per second. The low receiver-side overhead (1212 cycles) makes it practical to preempt requests as often as every 5μsec in order to schedule longer requests without wasting more than 10% of the workers’ throughput.” (Kaffes 等, p. 350) 表 1 显示了用于支持新宿抢占的中断传送的发送方和接收方优化相结合的结果。较低的发送方开销（298 个周期）使得构建一个每秒可处理数百万个调度操作的集中式抢占式调度程序变得切实可行。较低的接收端开销（1212 个周期）使得每 5 微秒抢占一次请求变得可行，以便调度更长的请求，而不会浪费超过 10% 的工作线程吞吐量。

纯软件的 notification 应该是无法达到这个开销

“The direct approach would be to use the swapcontext function in the Linux ucontext library.” (Kaffes 等, p. 350) 直接的方法是使用 Linux ucontext 库中的 swapcontext 函数。

用户态函数用在了 ring0 级别，应该是需要做一些修改的。这篇文章本质还是给协程增加了抢占调度功能，并将其运行在了内核态直接处理网络请求

“request context” (Kaffes 等, p. 350) 是指请求任务的上下文，后面的 worker context 应该是类似 helper 或者 idle 任务流，就是一开始就存在的那个

“The dispatcher uses timestamps to identify any request running for more than a predefined quantum (5 to 15μsec in our experiments) and, assuming the queue is not empty, preempts it.” (Kaffes 等, p. 350) 调度程序使用时间戳来识别任何运行时间超过预定义量程（在我们的实验中为 5 到 15 微秒）的请求，并且假设队列不为空，则会抢占它。

和定时器产生的中断抢占还不一样，完全是通过软件进行计算发送 IPI 中断实现的

“We use a modified version of the Linux ucontext library for context management. The context structure consists of a machine-specific representation of the saved state, the signal mask, a pointer to the context stack, and a pointer to the context that will be resumed when this context finishes execution.” (Kaffes 等, p. 351) 我们使用 Linux ucontext 库的修改版本进行上下文管理。上下文结构由保存状态的机器特定表示、信号掩码、指向上下文堆栈的指针以及指向当上下文完成执行时将恢复的上下文的指针组成。

如上猜测，确实是经过魔改的

“Shinjuku runs in VMX non-root mode ring 0, where a guest OS would run.” (Kaffes 等, p. 349)

这个我感觉很关键，dispatcher 是运行在内核态的，这样可以直接接收中断。类似用户态中断，dispatcher 就运行在用户态即可 (“ldh 学位论文”)

items.title: kvm: the Linux Virtual Machine Monitor
items.abstractNote: Virtualization is a hot topic in operating systems these days. It is useful in many scenarios: server consolidation, virtual test environments, and for Linux enthusiasts who still can not decide which distribution is best. Recently, hardware vendors of commodity x86 processors have added virtualization extensions to the instruction set that can be utilized to write relatively simple virtual machine monitors.

items.title: Unikraft: fast, specialized unikernels the easy way
items.abstractNote: Unikernels are famous for providing excellent performance in terms of boot times, throughput and memory consumption, to name a few metrics. However, they are infamous for making it hard and extremely time consuming to extract such performance, and for needing significant engineering effort in order to port applications to them. We introduce Unikraft, a novel micro-library OS that (1) fully modularizes OS primitives so that it is easy to customize the unikernel and include only relevant components and (2) exposes a set of composable, performance-oriented APIs in order to make it easy for developers to obtain high performance.

items.title: Asynchronous I/O Stack: A Low-latency Kernel I/O Stack for Ultra-Low Latency SSDs
items.abstractNote: Today’s ultra-low latency SSDs can deliver an I/O latency of sub-ten microseconds. With this dramatically shrunken device time, operations inside the kernel I/O stack, which were traditionally considered lightweight, are no longer a negligible portion. This motivates us to reexamine the storage I/O stack design and propose an asynchronous I/O stack (AIOS), where synchronous operations in the I/O path are replaced by asynchronous ones to overlap I/O-related CPU operations with device I/O. The asynchronous I/O stack leverages a lightweight block layer specialized for NVMe SSDs using the page cache without block I/O scheduling and merging, thereby reducing the sojourn time in the block layer. We prototype the proposed asynchronous I/O stack on the Linux kernel and evaluate it with various workloads. Synthetic FIO benchmarks demonstrate that the application-perceived I/O latency falls into single-digit microseconds for 4 KB random reads on Optane SSD, and the overall I/O latency is reduced by 15–33% across varying block sizes. This I/O latency reduction leads to a signiﬁcant performance improvement of real-world applications as well: 11–44% IOPS increase on RocksDB and 15–30% throughput improvement on Filebench and OLTP workloads.

items.title: FlexOS: Towards Flexible OS Isolation
items.abstractNote: At design time, modern operating systems are locked in a specific safety and isolation strategy that mixes one or more hardware/software protection mechanisms (e.g. user/kernel separation); revisiting these choices after deployment requires a major refactoring effort. This rigid approach shows its limits given the wide variety of modern applications’ safety/performance requirements, when new hardware isolation mechanisms are rolled out, or when existing ones break.

attachments.title: PDF
attachments.path: /Users/croak/Zotero/storage/MKR9JIJ7/Lefeuvre 等 - 2022 - FlexOS Towards Flexible OS Isolation.pdf

notes.note:
Comment: Artifact Evaluation Repository: https://github.com/project-flexos/asplos22-ae

“We present FlexOS, a novel OS allowing users to easily specialize the safety and isolation strategy of an OS at compilation/deployment time instead of design time.” (Lefeuvre 等, 2022, p. 1)

在编译时选择模块跑在哪个环境中，可配置系统

“FlexOS performs similarly or better than existing solutions which use fixed safety configurations.” (Lefeuvre 等, 2022, p. 1) FlexOS 的性能与使用固定安全配置的现有解决方案类似或更好。

这个是啥意思，和现有的一些 os 吗

“First, it precludes per-application OS specialization [24, 39, 60, 62] at a time when modern applications exhibit a wide range of safety and performance requirements.” (Lefeuvre 等, 2022, p. 1) 首先，当现代应用程序表现出广泛的安全和性能要求时，它排除了每个应用程序操作系统的专业化[24,39,60,62]。

“To answer this, we propose a semi-automated exploration technique named partial safety ordering, using partially ordered sets to describe the probabilistic security degrees of FlexOS’ configurations and identify the safest ones under a given performance budget.” (Lefeuvre 等, 2022, p. 2) 为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种名为部分安全排序的半自动化探索技术，使用部分排序集来描述 FlexOS 配置的概率安全程度，并在给定的性能预算下识别最安全的配置。

items.title: Towards Optimal Rack-scale μs-level CPU Scheduling through In-Network Workload Shaping
items.abstractNote: Rack-scale CPU scheduling has emerged as a promising direction to accommodate the increasing demands for microsecondlevel services. However, prior work suffers from both inaccurate load balancing in the network and complex yet sub-optimal scheduling within each server due primarily to its application-agnosticism. This paper presents Pallas, an application-aware rack-scale CPU scheduling solution for microsecond-level services with near-optimal performance. At the heart of Pallas is an in-network workload shaping to partition the workload into different shards, each of them preserving high homogeneity regarding the CPU demands. With the shaped workloads, Pallas then performs simple yet nearoptimal inter-server load balancing and intra-server scheduling. We have fully implemented Pallas and our extensive experiments across various synthetic workloads and real-world applications demonstrate that Pallas significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art solution RackSched by delivering stably low tail latency and high throughput, reducing tail latency by 8.5× at medium load and as much as two orders of magnitude at high load, while gracefully handling long-term workload shifts and short-term transient bursts.

items.title: Towards Fast, Adaptive, and Hardware-Assisted User-Space Scheduling
items.abstractNote: Modern cloud applications are prone to high tail latencies since their requests typically follow highly-dispersive distributions. Prior work has proposed both OS- and systemlevel solutions to reduce tail latencies for microsecond-scale workloads through better scheduling. Unfortunately, existing approaches like customized dataplane OSes, require significant OS changes, experience scalability limitations, or do not reach the full performance capabilities hardware offers. We propose LibPreemptible, a preemptive user-level threading library that is flexible, lightweight, and scalable. LibPreemptible is based on three key techniques: 1) a fast and lightweight hardware mechanism for delivery of timed interrupts, 2) a general-purpose user-level scheduling interface, and 3) an API for users to express adaptive scheduling policies tailored to the needs of their applications. Compared to the prior state-of-the-art scheduling system Shinjuku, our system achieves significant tail latency and throughput improvements for various workloads without the need to modify the kernel. We also demonstrate the flexibility of LibPreemptible across scheduling policies for real applications experiencing varying load levels and characteristics.

items.title: Hopter: a Safe, Robust, and Responsive Embedded Operating System
items.abstractNote: Microcontroller-based embedded systems are vulnerable to memory safety errors and must be robust and responsive because they are often used in unmanned and mission-critical scenarios. The Rust programming language offers an appealing compile-time solution for memory safety but leaves stack overflows unresolved and foils zero-latency interrupt handling. We present Hopter, a Rust-based embedded operating system (OS) that provides memory safety, system robustness, and interrupt responsiveness to embedded systems while requiring minimal application cooperation. Hopter executes Rust code under a novel finite-stack semantics that converts stack overflows into Rust panics, enabling recovery from fatal errors through stack unwinding and restart. Hopter also employs a novel mechanism called soft-locks so that the OS never disables interrupts. We compare Hopter with other well-known embedded OSes using controlled workloads and report our experience using Hopter to develop a flight control system for a miniature drone and a gateway system for Internet of Things (IoT). We demonstrate that Hopter is well-suited for resource-constrained microcontrollers and supports error recovery for real-time workloads.
